title: Foo Bar Derived Composite Metrics
description: Create a semantic layer with derived and composite metrics. Build materialized views or a metrics table that computes conversion_rate, avg_order_value, and daily_active_users from raw events.

tasks.description: Create analytics.metrics_daily with derived metrics: conversion_rate (purchases/views), avg_order_value, daily_active_users. Populate from raw analytics.events.

infrastructure.description: ClickHouse with analytics.events (view, cart, purchase events). Create derived metrics layer.
